name: Spicy Salmon Keto Poke Bowl
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces fresh salmon cut into 1” cubes
recipeInstructions: Prepare fish by adding marinade ingredients to a large bowl. Whisk well to combine and adjust seasonings to taste. Add cubes of salmon and stir to coat.

Begin to build your low carb poke bowl by adding cabbage to the bottom of each bowl and layer with riced cauliflower. Add salmon and desired toppings. Drizzle with keto poke sauce and garnish with sesame seeds.
author: perfectketo.com
nutrition: Serving Size: 1 bowl Calories: 331 Fat: 25g | Carbohydrates: 12g | Fiber: 4g | Protein: 20g
